data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Popular services and time slots', but the evidence provided does not include any specific data or metrics related to the popularity of services or time slots. While the linked use case mentions various metrics, it does not explicitly address the requirement in question. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to satisfy the requirement.
gaps: No evidence provided regarding the popularity of specific services or time slots.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
